reviews.comment:
Le pongo tres estrellas porque en el viaje de regreso los baños de mujeres estaban muy sucia y me llamó la atención porque no suele ser así. Los sándwiches son deliciosos

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving it three stars because on the return trip the women's restrooms were very dirty, which surprised me because they're not usually like that. The sandwiches are delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBbXVxRC13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños muy limpios. Parada en mitad de la patagonia

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were very clean. A stop in the middle of Patagonia.

reviews.comment:
Siempre carga cuando vas a Esquel los sandwiches 10 puntos

(Translated by Google)
Always pack sandwiches when you go to Esquel. 10 points!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBb3QtaWFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Una parada obligatoria para cargar nafta. Sigue teniendo algo de las viejas estaciones de servicio de ruta. Suele no funcionar el pos net. La atención es correcta.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for gas. It still has a bit of the old-fashioned roadside service station feel. The card reader often doesn't work. The service is adequate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnLTR6Z2hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El hotel es excelente para parar una noche y seguir. Son 10 habitaciones con baños muy lindos y cómodos. TV con directv. Tiene un salón desayunador con un metegol y mesa de ping pong. El desayuno es muy bueno. Y el precio es barato. Un gran hotel a la altura del ACA. Muy atentos los empleados. Enfrente de la ruta hay comedores muy buenos.

(Translated by Google)
The hotel is excellent for a one-night stop before continuing your journey. It has 10 rooms with very nice and comfortable bathrooms. There's a TV with DirecTV. It also has a breakfast room with a foosball table and a ping-pong table. The breakfast is very good. And the price is reasonable. A great hotel, worthy of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). The staff is very attentive. There are some very good restaurants across the road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnejllX0ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio. Hay que tener en cuenta que en vacaciones o fines de semana largos puede quedarse sin combustible. Los sandwichitos de jamon crudo mantexa y pan casero, imperdibles!!!

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. Keep in mind that during holidays or long weekends, you may run out of fuel. The raw ham sandwiches with homemade bread are unmissable!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbXBTVmdRRRAB

reviews.comment:

Simple place to spend the night. Very friendly staff.

reviews.comment:
No tengo fotos, pero sugiero que cuando pasen a cargar NAFTA, pidan los sandwiches de jamón cocido o crudo  y queso, con manteca ( para mí son los mejores) o mayonesa...en pan casero ...un manjar!

(Translated by Google)
I don't have any pictures, but I suggest that when you stop to fill up with gas, you order the ham or prosciutto and cheese sandwiches, with butter (for me they're the best) or mayonnaise...on homemade bread...a real treat!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbWV5SzVnRRAB
